properties.name: app.auth.jwt.secret
properties.description: The secret key used for signing JWT tokens.

properties.name: app.auth.jwt.expiration
properties.description: The expiration time for JWT tokens in milliseconds.

properties.name: app.auth.cookie.name
properties.description: The name of the authentication cookie.

properties.name: app.auth.cookie.secure
properties.description: Whether the authentication cookie should be marked as secure.

properties.name: app.auth.cookie.same-site
properties.description: The SameSite attribute for the authentication cookie (e.g., Lax, Strict, None).

properties.name: app.timetable.max-generation-ms
properties.description: The maximum time allowed for timetable generation in milliseconds. If the generation process exceeds this time, it will be terminated to prevent resource exhaustion.
